CORE Shapeshifting Research Atlas

Catalog supernatural, occult, metaphysical, cultural, and speculative biological claims with explicit evidence labels. Do not treat metaphysical claims as established biomedical fact.

Separate AI assistant, retrieval console, and crawler surfaces have been removed. The atlas focuses on source logging, in-app browsing, imports, profiles, team collaboration, documents, and memory snapshots.

ErydirCeisiwr Backend Mechanics Core: Internal routing and synthesis scaffold derived from the ErydirCeisiwr attachment request. It controls how prompts, profiles, source records, source records, browser leads, documents, and exports are staged inside the static build.

Google Programmable Search

Search engine ID: 56f7592d1993141c3. Script URL: https://cse.google.com/cse.js?cx=56f7592d1993141c3. Public URL: https://cse.google.com/cse?cx=56f7592d1993141c3#gsc.tab=0.

Google Custom Search JSON API

Local endpoint: /api/search. Authentication: Server-side GOOGLE_CUSTOM_SEARCH_API_KEY. Status: Preferred backend search path when hosted on a server with an API key; otherwise the app falls back to embedded CSE result cards.

OpenAI Responses Chat

Local endpoint: /api/openai-chat. Model: gpt-5.5. Authentication: Server-side OPENAI_API_KEY. Stored messages: 0.

File Import Layer

0 imported file logs; 0 source records created from uploaded files.

In-App Browser

0 captured browser targets.

Team Chat and Recommendations

0 team posts stored; 0 open recommendations.

Collaboration Documents

TitleTypeStatusOwnerPreview
CORE Research BriefResearch BriefDraftUserSethResearch Objective Use this workspace to draft source-backed briefs, grimoire chapters, meeting notes, PDF handoffs, and review packets. Keep links visible and mark every claim by evidence tier before promoting it into S

Internal Memory Bank

Browser runtime snapshots are stored locally by the app and can be exported from the Memory tab.

Uploaded Reference Layer

TitlePagesEvidenceCitationBackend Use
Wolf-Shapeshifting Grimoire: Summary of Sources and Concepts16Speculative frameworkNeeds verificationSeed source taxonomy, topic clustering, and initial source-discovery leads.
The Magic of Shapeshifting - Rosalyn Greene261Secondary scholarshipNeeds verificationProvide occult terminology leads and comparative concepts while avoiding long reproduced excerpts.
ErydirCeisiwr Internal Mechanics Core47Speculative frameworkNeeds verificationDrive internal routing, layered synthesis, staged review, profile-aware context, and export structure.
Learning to Shift30Experiential claimNeeds verificationSeed practice-related source leads and profile-aware prompt scaffolds with explicit uncertainty labels.
